title: AgentScan Configuration
description: Configuration file for the AgentScan GitHub App (.github/agentscan.yml)

version.description: Schema version of this config file. Omit or set to 1 for the current format. Increment if a future AgentScan release introduces breaking changes.

scan.description: Controls which event types AgentScan analyses.

pull-requests.description: Analyse pull requests. Enabled by default.

allowed-users.description: GitHub usernames to exclude from scanning.

trusted-author-associations.description: Author associations to exclude from scanning (e.g. trusted maintainers opening their own PRs/issues).

comment-on-organic.description: Post a comment even when the analysis result is 'organic'. Organic accounts are silenced by default.

auto-close.description: Automatically close PRs/issues opened by flagged accounts.

auto-close-classifications.description: Classifications that trigger auto-close. Requires auto-close to be true.

mode.description:
Controls what actions AgentScan takes on each PR/issue.
- full: post a comment and apply labels (default)
- comment: post a comment only
- labels: apply labels only
- silent: run analysis but post no comment or labels (still reports a passing "Analysis skipped" check on PRs)

labels.description: Custom label names to apply to flagged PRs/issues.

community-flagged.description: Label applied when the account is on the community-verified automations list.

mixed.description: Label applied when the account has mixed automation signals.

automation.description: Label applied when the account is classified as automated.

messages.description: Custom comment messages for each classification result. Supports Markdown.

organic.description: Message posted when the account is classified as organic (human).

mixed.description: Message posted when the account has mixed automation signals.

automation.description: Message posted when the account is classified as automated.

community-flagged.description: Message posted when the account is on the community-verified automations list.
